### Solution:
```python
import re
def extract_template(s):
    s = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s]','', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+','', s)
    return re.sub(r'(\w+)(\s+)(\w+)', r'\1<*> \3', s)
```
